overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a journey through Night City. The clip begins with exploration of a street food area beneath a massive arcology tower, transitions through trash-filled back alleys, and continues with high-speed driving through sunlit commercial districts with neon billboards and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food stall beneath mega arcology tower

events.description: camera pans down from looking up at the tower to street level revealing the trash-filled lot and billboards

agents.ego_description: standing near a food stall, panning the camera up the massive arcology tower and then around to survey the surrounding street

entered.detail: green and yellow striped awning with neon lighting underneath
massive white and blue tiered building with geometric windows dominating the skyline
yellow neon tubes running along the edge of the food stall roof
raised concrete highway structure with metal railings spanning across the view
large pink and blue illuminated advertisement billboard visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath the shelter of a street food stall with a massive arcology tower looming overhead. The camera slowly pans up the tower's facade, then rotates to reveal a sunlit urban landscape with elevated highways and distant neon billboards. The area appears deserted with piles of trash visible in the adjacent lot.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered back alley with trash accumulation

events.description: moves from the open street into a narrow alleyway with concrete walls and scattered debris

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the narrow alley, passing trash piles and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: gray concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
large mounds of blue garbage bags and scattered debris accumulated along the wall
tall palm tree growing from the sidewalk area
electrical utility boxes with warning stripes painted red and white

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow back alley flanked by graffiti-covered concrete walls. Trash bags and debris line the path while palm trees provide sparse vegetation. The mega tower and food stall from the previous scene disappear from view as the camera advances through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with vehicle traffic

events.description: turns right at an intersection, accelerating along the main road
passes a green van and other vehicles on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the city street, navigating through light traffic and passing pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: green van driving in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall red and white industrial structure with exposed scaffolding and metal framework
elevated highway structure with support columns crossing over the street
tall building with large pink cola advertisement on the facade
futuristic metro station entrance with white roof and glass panels

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley onto a commercial street, the camera accelerates to driving speed. A distinctive red industrial building rises on the left while a highway overpass spans the road ahead. The scene includes light vehicle traffic with a green van ahead and scattered pedestrians on the sidewalks. A metro station structure becomes visible on the right as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with metro station and billboards

events.description: approaches the metro station plaza, transitioning from enclosed street to open intersection
slows down approaching a red traffic light at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: cruising through the wide intersection, slowing for the red light while pedestrians wait at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk corner near the metro station

entered.detail: futuristic entrance with metal grates and illuminated signage for the metro system
white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide open intersection dominated by a futuristic metro station entrance. Large crosswalk markings cover the asphalt while pedestrians gather at the corners. The traffic light shows red, causing vehicles to slow. The highway overpass shifts to the left as the camera positions itself facing the metro station gates.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station crosswalk with pedestrian traffic

events.description: traffic light changes to green, pedestrians begin crossing the street

agents.ego_description: stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross, observing the metro station entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrians crossing the street in front of the camera from left to right

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera stopped at the metro station intersection as pedestrians cross the wide crosswalk. The traffic signal changes from red to green, allowing movement to resume. The metro station facade remains prominent in the background while the highway overpass disappears from view behind the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from the oppressive shadow of a mega-structure into the bright, bustling activity of a futuristic commercial intersection. It begins beneath a street food stall, panning up the facade of a looming arcology tower before rotating toward a sunlit urban landscape of elevated highways and deserted, trash-strewn lots. The camera then pushes forward into a narrow, graffiti-covered back alley lined with debris and sparse palm trees, moving away from the tower into an enclosed concrete corridor. As the camera emerges from the alley, it accelerates onto a commercial street past a red industrial building and under a highway overpass, weaving through light traffic toward a prominent metro station. The movement finally culminates at a wide open intersection, where the camera pauses at a red light amidst crossing pedestrians before the signal turns green and the view settles on the metro station gates.
